evals.expected_output: Should check for .project-index.yaml first. If not found, scan the project and generate a text tree with box-drawing characters

assertions.text: Generates a text tree with box-drawing characters
Does NOT use emojis in the output

evals.prompt: Generate project index. A .project-index.yaml file exists.
evals.expected_output: Should read the YAML and use it as a guide, respecting the order and groupings defined, only showing what the YAML lists

assertions.text: Respects the order and groupings from the YAML
Only shows what the YAML lists, not the entire filesystem

evals.prompt: Map the project. It has over 500 files.
evals.expected_output: Should show only the first 2 levels and ask whether to go deeper

assertions.text: Limits initial output to 2 levels of depth
